name: @baohaus/baohaus-theme-aurora-light-bao

scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun test && bun run build && bun run bao:build && bun run bao:validate

description: Aurora-tinted light daisyUI 5 theme variant — Apple HIG 2026 aligned teal/cyan/sage accent layer over the platform-canonical light surface. Shipped as an installable .bao theme-pack alongside the boot-zero baohaus-light default.
